pred: The ground truth for fake news is established through manual annotation by an expert, who labels tweets as containing fake news or not.
answers: Ground truth is not established in the paper

pred: An extension of the NetVLAD approach that adds ghost clusters to absorb noisy or irrelevant content.
answers: extension of the NetVLAD, adds Ghost clusters along with the NetVLAD clusters
An extension of NetVLAD which replaces hard assignment-based clustering with soft assignment-based clustering with the additon o fusing Ghost clusters to deal with noisy content.
the attention model, MDREA, also outperforms the best existing research results (WAP 0.690 to 0.688)

pred: Context tweets and character-level representations are proposed as additional features, and the context of the tweet is also considered.
answers: using tweets that one has replied or quoted to as contextual information

pred: The proposed approach outperforms other WSD approaches employing word embeddings, achieving better results on benchmark datasets.

pred: The ensemble method used is a "greedy ensemble" that selects the top-performing models from a pool of 10 models.
